title: Ein Sof
desc: Radiating golden light from the unbounded source. Where Kabbalistic cosmology meets the Jungian Self.

title: Solve et Coagula
desc: The great work of dissolution and reformation. Gold ink on black, after the alchemical manuscripts of Rudolf II's court.

title: The Shadow & the Vessel
desc: Oil on linen, 36×48". The Jungian Shadow as broken vessel — the Qliphoth made visible. One of a kind.

title: Flower of Life
desc: The foundational pattern underlying all form. Precision-drawn, hand-finished with gold leaf accents. Edition of 40.

title: The Self — Mandala I
desc: Jung drew mandalas during his confrontation with the unconscious. This is that confrontation made visible.

title: Tzimtzum
desc: The sacred contraction of God to make room for creation. A cosmogony of inner space. Etching, edition of 25.

title: Sophia Descending
desc: Gold leaf and acrylic on panel, 24×36". Divine wisdom — Sophia — in her luminous descent through the aeons.

title: The 99 Names
desc: Arabic calligraphy dissolved into sacred geometry. The divine attributes as a single unified radiant field.

title: The Philosopher's Stone
desc: Ink and gold leaf on vellum, 14×18". After Atalanta Fugiens. The lapis as the Self crystallised in matter.

title: Metatron's Cube
desc: All five Platonic solids encoded in a single figure. The map of form itself. Gold on deep ground.
